FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Powell Departure and Rising Yields Drive USD Strength
tldr_points: Powell exit signals policy uncertainty, supporting USD safe-haven flows
Rising US yields and gold weakness confirm dollar strength thesis
Technical setup favors buying on dips toward key moving averages
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised to extend gains as Powell departure fuels inflation fears and yield-driven dollar demand
FX.comment: Powell exit and rising yields create USD strength thesis; buy on MA20 dips

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Technical Support Holds as Earnings Season Approaches
tldr_points: S&P 500 maintains position near all-time highs with MA20 support intact
Upcoming Nvidia and Walmart earnings represent key fundamental catalysts
Institutional flows remain constructive with no major distribution days
STOCKS.excerpt: Buy the dip toward MA20 support; earnings catalysts provide near-term tailwind.
STOCKS.comment: Technical support at MA20 intact; earnings catalysts provide near-term upside potential

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Rotation Toward Bitcoin Amid Regulatory Clarity Push
